title: Bump Cargo.toml version 0.1.0 -> 0.1.2
action: Change the single line `version = "0.1.0"` to `version = "0.1.2"` in Cargo.toml's [package] section. Patch-only bump, following this repo's existing convention (v0.1.0 -> v0.1.1 was also patch-only despite containing a large feature). No other fields change. Cargo.lock's herdr-go package version entry will follow automatically on next `cargo check`/`cargo test`.

truths: cargo test and cargo clippy -D warnings still pass
Cargo.lock's herdr-go package version entry matches 0.1.2 after a build
prohibitions: Do not change any other Cargo.toml field
Do not touch src/ or any other file
